_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Globe Feature Section
_meta.description: The Featured_05 component is a modern hero section designed to spotlight Ruixen UI’s core value proposition. On the left, it presents a bold heading and supporting text that communicates the simplicity, scalability, and performance of the UI library. A prominent call-to-action button encourages users to engage immediately. On the right, a visually striking animated globe subtly anchors the section, reinforcing the product’s global relevance and modern aesthetic. The layout is fully responsive, ensuring that content and visuals remain balanced across devices.
